description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical lotion container with a metal top and a colorful, artistic label wrapped around its body. The label features a collage of pastel and earthy tones, with abstract patterns, wavy lines, and blocks of text in various fonts. Prominently, the word 'Arizona' is visible in large, bold letters, suggesting a thematic or branding element. The container also displays a nutrition facts panel, indicating it may be styled after a food or beverage can, but is annotated as a lotion product. The cap appears to be a simple, flat metal lid, likely removable by twisting or pulling. The overall design is visually striking, with a mix of text, graphics, and color bands that make it stand out in an urban environment.
description: A tall, cylindrical lotion container with a metal lid and a vibrant, multi-colored label featuring abstract patterns, text, and the word 'Arizona' in bold letters.
description_view_0: This view shows the front of the container, highlighting the text blocks and colorful abstract patterns on the label.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the wavy, pastel-colored bands and geometric shapes, with less visible text.
description_view_2: This view reveals the nutrition facts panel and the large, bold 'Arizona' text, making branding and product information prominent.
description_view_3: This view displays the continuation of the 'Arizona' text and more of the label's text blocks, with a focus on the artistic design.
